title: John Myer's Who You Love
lyrics: Alright, let's go. You're not the one that I saw coming Sometimes I don't know which way to go And tried to run before, but I'm not running anymore And I fought against it hard enough to know That you love who you love, who you love Yeah, you love who you love, who you love Yeah, you love who you love, who you love Oh, you can't make yourself stop dreaming who you're dreaming of When it's who you love, then it's who you love Ooh, ooh, ooh Oh, say it Peek-a-boo, baby, peek-a-boo Hold your heart, move, baby I'm fucking going Never wanna let that feeling go Who you love, who you love Yeah, you love who you love, who you love Yeah, you love who you love, who you love Oh, you can't make yourself stop dreaming who you're dreaming of When it's who you love, then it's who you love Oh, yeah, baby Nighttime came running, now we see it Before we see each other in the clearest of views Because I didn't love me and you didn't love you But on that journey together, baby, baby, we'll find it And really love each other for the worst of it And the media, oh Instead of being jealous and having me a cover off of flags With inserts in our own soul With love Who you love, who you love Clue to yourself, man You love who you love, who you love I mean, especially yourself, man Oh, you love who you love, who you love Yeah Oh, you can't make yourself stop dreaming who you're dreaming of When it's who you love, then it's who you love Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah To our love, to our love, to our love To our love, to our love Baby, your love, your love To our love, to our love, to our love To our love, to our love Because you love Your love God damn it God damn it, it's you I love you I do love you Very much Very much
